column7: N4 qualifier + 11-digit NDC + unit of measure + quantity
column19: The N4 qualifier must appear as a single unspaced prefix directly before the 11-digit NDC. A space between N4 and the NDC number will cause a format rejection even if the NDC itself is correct.
